DISCOVERY 302, DEFENDANT GOODFELLOW TOP GRADE CONTRUCTION, LLC'S MOTION TO COMPEL THE DEPOSITION OF PLAINTIFF AND REQUEST FOR $3,883.05 IN SANCTIONS AGAINST PLAINTIFF. THE MOTION IS GRANTED IN PART AS FOLLOWS: WITHIN THIRTY DAYS OF SERVICE OF NOTICE OF ENTRY OF THIS ORDER, PLAINTIFF IS TO (1) APPEAR FOR THE CONTINUATION AND CONCLUSION OF HIS DEPOSITION, ON A DATE AND AT A TIME TO BE MUTUALLY AGREED, AND (2) PAY DISCOVERY SANCTIONS TO DEFENDANT'S COUNSEL IN THE TOTAL AMOUNT OF $1,479.55, TO COVER THE COURT REPORTER COSTS ($894.80), VIDEOGRAPHER COSTS ($348.25) AND ATTORNEY'S FEES (1.1 HOURS AT $215/HOUR) INCURRED BY DEFENDANT AS A RESULT OF PLAINTIFF'S FAILURE TO APPEAR FOR HIS DEPOSITION ON SEPTEMBER 13, 2018. DEFENDANT'S REQUEST FOR SANCTIONS IN EXCESS OF $1,479.55 IS DENIED. COUNSEL FOR DEFENDANT IS TO PREPARE AND SUBMIT AN ORDER THAT TRACTS THE TENTATIVE RULING AND COMPLIES WITH CRC 3.1312 TO JUDGE PRO TEM ROGER MEAD AT RMEAD@FOLGERLEVIN.COM. JUDGE PRO TEM: ROGER MEAD; CLERK: WILLIAM TRUPEK; NOT REPORTED. (302/JPT)

calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Feb-15-2019 Vacated

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Plaintiffs Attendance At Deposition And Request For Terminating, Evidence And Or Issue Sanctions Against Plaintiff And Request For $2,617.80 In Monetary Sanctions Against Plaintiff
Off Calendar Jan-08-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
John P. Briscoe, Esq, Mayall Hurley, Telephone (209) 477-3833, appearing for Plaintiff;
Allison L. Shrallow, Esq., Lewis Brisbois, Telephone (415) 262-8566, appearing for Defendant Goodfellow Top Grade Construction, LLC;

ARGUED. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT GOODFELLOW TOP GRADE CONTRUCTION, LLC'S Motion To Compel Plaintiffs Attendance At Deposition And Request For Terminating, Evidence And Or Issue Sanctions Against Plaintiff And Request For $2,617.80 In Monetary Sanctions Against Plaintiff

The motion to compel is granted. The motion for terminating sanctions is denied. Moving party to submit a proposed order that complies with CRC 3.1312 by email to Judge Pro Tem Jason Yurasek at jyjudgeprotem@gmail.com.

Judge Pro Tem: Jason Yurasek; Clerk: William Trupek; Not reported. (302/JPT)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel The Deposition Of Plaintiff And Request For $3,883.05 In Sanctions Against Plaintiff
Off Calendar Oct-23-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
John P. Briscoe, Esq., Attorney at Law, Telephone (209) 477-3833, apeparing for Plaintiff Olatunji O. Raheem;
Allison L Shrallow, Esq., Lewis Brisbois, Telpehone (415) 362-2580, appearing for Defendant Godfellow Top Grade Construction, LLC.,

The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT GOODFELLOW TOP GRADE CONTRUCTION, LLC's Motion To Compel The Deposition Of Plaintiff And Request For $3,883.05 In Sanctions Against Plaintiff.

The motion is granted in part as follows: Within thirty days of service of notice of entry of this order, Plaintiff is to (1) appear for the continuation and conclusion of his deposition, on a date and at a time to be mutually agreed, and (2) pay discovery sanctions to Defendant's counsel in the total amount of $1,479.55, to cover the court reporter costs ($894.80), videographer costs ($348.25) and attorney's fees (1.1 hours at $215/hour) incurred by defendant as a result of plaintiff's failure to appear for his deposition on September 13, 2018. Defendant's request for sanctions in excess of $1,479.55 is denied. Counsel for defendant is to prepare and submit an order that tracts the tentative ruling and complies with CRC 3.1312 to Judge Pro Tem Roger Mead at rmead@folgerlevin.com.

Judge Pro Tem: Roger Mead; Clerk: William Trupek; Not reported. (302/JPT)
